package rulecoverage

func PositiveGoPerfLayerIoOperationsScannerUsedForLargeTokenStream() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_io_operations_scanner_used_for_large_token_stream"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Layer: I/O operations. Flag bufio.Scanner on potentially large tokens without Buffer sizing or Reader alternatives."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
